violations.text: Menu lacks an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC replaced soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen and bathroom was lacking paper towels. PIC replaced paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink in deli area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025
Inspector observed tortillas from an unapproved source. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025
Inspector observed produce with mold in the walk-in cooler. PIC discarded produce. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer, bandsaw, knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIT took items out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

Corn flour and milk based beverage, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025
Inspector observed bottles of restricted pesticides in kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025
Inspector observed large pot of corn flour and milk beverage with (with lid) cooling in the prep area from the previous night. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

Cow tongue was observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. PIC placed item in 2 door fridge. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

Dry ingredients packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, common allergens, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025
Inspector observed cat in establishment. PIC instructed to remove cat from establishment, including basement. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025
Onions were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025
Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

The cutting boards in the deli area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025
Prep unit located in the kitchen area was not in good repair (ambient of 49F was observed). New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

Wood is used in the construction in the following areas: - shelf under prep table in kitchen area - mounted on wall above 3 bay sink in kitchen area - mounted behind sink in deli areaNon-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - prep unit - shelf under flat top grill - freezer chests (ice buildup) - walk-in fan blades New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025
Inspector observed leak at faucet at sink in deli area. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025
Inspector observed an accumulation of trash and leaf litter around refuse area. Area to be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

The following was observed in poor repair: - floors in deli area (cracked/lose floor tiles) - floors in retail area (cracked tiles) - wall in kitchen area (hole in wall) - cement floor in deli area (exposed cement) - ceiling tiles in retail area (previous water damage) New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2026
The ceiling in the deli area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025
